note: The correct half of the bill-splitting pair. divmod keeps the remainder and hands one extra penny to as many payers as needed, so nothing is lost and nobody pays more than a penny over. Every claim below was verified by running it.

labels.text: the amounts always add up to exactly the total
labels.why: verified: split_bill(100, 3) returns [34, 33, 33], which sums to exactly 100. The remainder is distributed rather than discarded.

labels.text: no two people are asked for amounts differing by more than one penny
labels.why: verified: the spread between the largest and smallest amount is 1. Only the first `extra` payers pay a single penny more.
